description.value:
Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points while Communion lasts.

The Ansu does not permit the vessel to break — and it answers. You remain at 1 Hit Point, you immediately make one melee Strike against the creature that downed you (if it's within your reach), and you increase your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} condition by 1 — the body keeps the bill.

Cooldown: 10 minutes.
